paper.title: Personality-Adaptive Conversational AI for Emotional Support: A Simulation Study Integrating Big Five Detection with Zurich Model Regulation
paper.abstract_summary: Proposes a theory-grounded personality-adaptive pipeline that performs turn-by-turn Big Five trait detection and applies Zurich Model-aligned behavioral regulation, orchestrated with PROMISE for traceable, reproducible control.

main_findings.general_quality_preserved: No degradation (emotional tone d=0.000, relevance d=0.183)

key_new_additions.authors: Ahmad, R.; Siemon, D.; Gnewuch, U.; Robra-Bissantz, S.
key_new_additions.title: Designing Personality-Adaptive Conversational Agents for Mental Health Care
key_new_additions.relevance: One-size-fits-all problem in mental health CAs

key_new_additions.authors: Wanniarachchi, V.U.; Greenhalgh, C.; Choi, A.; Warren, J.R.
key_new_additions.title: Personalization Variables in Digital Mental Health Interventions for Depression and Anxiety in Adolescents and Youth: A Scoping Review
key_new_additions.relevance: 51% of interventions use only one personalization dimension

key_new_additions.authors: Soni, U.; Thakkar, H.; Pandya, A.; Patel, D.
key_new_additions.title: The Power of Personalization: A Systematic Review of Personality-Adaptive Chatbots
key_new_additions.relevance: Challenge of developing chatbots that adapt to user personality

prism_import.import_instructions: Upload references.bib to Prism via Import > BibTeX
